title: THE ULTIMATE REVENGE MARRIGE: I WED MY FAMILY'S ENEMY! ♟️His Only Rule: "No One Touches My Wife.❤️‍🔥
description:
Welcome to subscribe and be the first to watch the latest short dramas! 🥰
💗 / https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCJYXcTCfvzXsHuWEsN_i8jQ

This is your personal short drama hub! 💐 Sweet romance, angst, rebirth, time travel, and more – high-energy updates every day! Plot twists, heart-fluttering moments, non-stop sweetness and no dull moments – perfect for keeping you entertained through every boring day and night!
Follow us and watch great dramas together! 🌸

    ————————————————————✨ 他野✨——————————

subtitle.text:
Excuse me,
move aside!
Hurry, a doctor!
Qiqi,
take off all this
man's pants!
All of them?
But he…
What? Is this your first day of medical school?
Or are you worried he will make you
marry him once he wakes up?
Marry him? Absolutely not!
He is Sheng Xiao,
a dangerous individual,
and the number one enemy of my family.
Hurry up, he needs immediate control of the bleeding,
I need to go prepare the disinfection tools.
Alright.
I feel defiled.
What are you doing?
I-I was controlling the bleeding for you.
How dare you remove this man's pants?
I was just…
Are you still looking?!
Young Master, you are awake.
Where is that girl from The Mu family?
She was just here checking on you.
Take it easy, Young Master.
She saw me completely exposed,
and now she wants to make a clean getaway?
Find that woman,
I'm going to silence her!
Hey!
Sister,
please come back quickly,
Grandma is in trouble.
What?
I'm coming back right away.
Young master,
the girl from The Mu family is gone.
It's still early.
Drive there and corner her.
Your injury—
My reputation is more important than my wounds.
Mu Tangxue,
what are you doing?
Sister,
Grandma took the medicine you gave her,
and died from a sudden heart attack.
Mom and Dad are angry inside,
you should stay out.
That's impossible!
How could Grandma be dead?
Let me see her!
Don't even think about it.
Let me see her,
let go!
What do you think you're doing?
Dad,
please let me see Grandma one last time,
okay?
I beg you.
Your grandma is gone.
She loved you so much,
how could you be so cruel?
I didn't!
I would never hurt Grandma!
You still deny it?
Xue'er saw it herself this morning,
you gave your grandma the wrong medication.
It's always you!
Why do you only believe her?
Let me see.
Xue'er,
are you alright?
Mom, my hand hurts,
she pinched me.
Xue'er is delicate,
you are the older sister.
Can't you just let her have her way?
But I didn't pinch her.
You're lying now!
Just because Qier is living with me,
did you forget
that you gave birth to this one too?
Qier, let's go.
Mom, Dad, please!
Just let me see Grandma one last time,
can't I?
I beg you to believe me,
just this once!
No.
Ever since you were little,
you only cause us disappointment.
From now on,
The Mu family has no daughter like you.
Leave.
Everyone go back inside.
If anyone opens the door for her again,
they will be thrown out with her.
Xue'er, let's go home.
Mom and Dad, we're sisters,
let me say goodbye to my sister.
Then hurry up and come in after you finish.
Okay, Mom.
I'll just say a few words.
The only person in
the whole wide world who believed in you,
is gone.
She is your grandmother too,
how could you be so cruel?
Mu Qiqi, in this world,
having one daughter in The Mu family
is enough.
You and Grandma,
two irrelevant people,
both of you
should just vanish from this world.
Young master,
are we just going to watch?
It seems my reputation
is safe today.
Wait a little longer.
Qiqi.
Qiqi!
Auntie,
you came just in time.
Sister has been thrown out,
it's perfect!
You can go with her
to that broken
rental apartment and squeeze in.
I'll help you pack your bags.
Qiqi.
Get down now.
Qiqi, what are you doing?
Qiqi!
Young Master Sheng,
where are you taking Qiqi?
Home.
From now on, she belongs to me.
Grandma?
W-where am I?
Your parents abandoned you.
I'm letting you stay here.
No! I don't want to!
I want to go back!
I'm going to destroy them!
I'm going to destroy them!
I'm going to destroy them
and avenge Grandma!
I told you to calm down!
I don't have Grandma anymore!
I have no home!
I can't live without her!
I can't live without her!
She's still in the bathroom, she hasn't come out yet.
She's been in
there for two hours already.
Whether you want to admit it or not,
your grandmother has passed away.
If I were you,
given even the slightest chance,
i would definitely crush
those enemies underfoot.
Where is
that chance?
Me.
Following me is your chance.
What gives you the right to control me?
The fact that you pulled down my pants.
If i don't get some payback,
wouldn't that be quite a loss for me?
I think you're just ugly in my eyes.
You knew the consequences, yet you still dared to pull down my pants?
So what do you want?
You don't think i'm
just staring at you, do you?
Then why are you
keeping your enemy's
daughter by your side?
I find it rather entertaining.
So, are you in?
Young master.
Miss Qiqi's aunt is here asking for her.
Let her in.
Understood.
You dared to pull down my pants,
but you're afraid to stay by my side?
Who said i'm afraid?
Think carefully before you answer.
I'm waiting for your reply.
Qiqi,
Qiqi!
Auntie!
Are you alright, Qiqi?
Why are you so foolish?
If Mr. Sheng hadn't stopped you,
you would have crossed the line.
I am sorry, Auntie,
I won't do it again.
Come here.
Qiqi, I came to see you this time
originally about
your grandmother's will.
She left the most valuable land
to you.
She even invited the chairman of the Tiansheng Group,
Old Mrs. Lin, to witness the notarization.
It's just unfortunate…
I heard them talking about it.
That piece of land is located in the city center,
and is worth over three billion dollars.
Dad has always wanted it.
No, that's not right.
That person is no longer my father.
The Mu family probably
doesn't know about that will yet.
Knowing your father,
he won't let go of that land.
Mu Tangxue harmed Grandma.
They always favor the younger daughter.
I won't let them get away with this.
But right now,
you are still a young girl.
How are you going to keep that land?
Auntie,
I am with Sheng Xiao now.
How can that be?
Your two families are bitter rivals.
What right does he have to protect you?
But only if I stick with him,
can I protect
what Grandma left me.
Mom left us so abruptly,
she didn't leave a will.
I'm afraid the second and third siblings
will try to claim that land.
Dad, if you don't want to split it up,
why not draft a fake will?
Xue'er is right,
but,
if I take the will
by myself,
I'm afraid they'll become suspicious.
How about we first
write that Grandma left the land to me,
and then I transfer it to you?
Qishan,
Xue'er is known for her filial piety,
so it's only reasonable for her to inherit Grandma's land.
Xue'er's birthday is in a few days.
At that time,
we will take out the will and
announce it publicly,
and your two brothers
won't be able to say anything against it.
Exactly!
I will host a grand birthday party for you.
But Dad,
Grandma only just passed away.
Won't that look bad?
The person is gone.
What is more
important than the living?
Your grandma won't blame us.
Mu Qiqi, without you,
everything in The Mu family is mine.
Please,
Young Master, Miss Qiqi has arrived.
Come here.
Why are you staying in a hotel?
My place is very safe.
I let you stay there.
What,
do you want me to stay
and live with you?
N-no.
Change my dressing.
Take off your pants,
or just take everything off.
What, seeing me outside wasn't enough?
Do you want to strip off my underwear too?
It's not like I haven't seen it before.
What did you say?
Nothing.
You should wear briefs instead.
Otherwise, this is hard for me to deal with.
Does it hurt?
Continue.
If I stick with you,
will I have a future?
Everything I have, you will have.
What if The Mu family comes to claim me back?
No one has
ever taken anything away
from me.
I am not a thing.
Is the view down there good?
I'm just dressing your wound,
I can't help what I see.
I was asking if the carpet is nice.
You keep staring at it,
what if I bleed out?
Is my technique really that bad?
It's getting late.
You should head back now.
Here's your room key.
If you want to come back here later,
you're always welcome.
Mm.
And if you ever change your mind,
and want to move in with me,
you can do that too, anytime.
I…
Can my aunt stay with me then?
Whatever makes you happy.
One day,
I want to become as powerful as you are.
Good morning, Qiqi.
Morning.
Did President Sheng leave already?
The young master left quite a while ago.
Did he leave any instructions?
No.
Right.
He is the crown prince of Huangyao,
always traveling far and wide.
He barely has time to rest, even when injured,
why would he have time for my trifling matters?
I just heard the news.
Your father is hosting
a lavish birthday banquet
for Mu Tangxue the day after tomorrow.
What? Grandma just passed away,
and they have the nerve to throw a birthday party?
Tell me about it.
She was your paternal grandmother,
I can't believe your father is so heartless.
He wouldn't even give her a proper send-off.
I'm going to confront them.
If you rush over there now,
what will you actually change?
What do you mean?
I have sources within The Mu family.
The birthday
banquet your father prepared
for Mu Tangxue
this time is simply
to swallow up that priceless land your grandmother held.
My grandmother's body is barely cold,
and they already dare to fight over the inheritance?
Sheng Xiao,
actually,
Grandma left that plot of land
to me.
Come closer.
You tell me this so directly,
aren't you worried I'll seize
that land?
You are not that kind of man.
The crown prince of Huangyao,
the reason you have the status you do today
is never by taking things from others.
You know me that well?
Sheng Xiao,
can I go make a scene?
Anyone associated with Sheng Xiao
can make whatever scene they want.
Jingyun,
go investigate
what The Mu family
has prepared for this event.
Handle everything for Qiqi.
Yes, don't worry, Young Master.
I have to go to the United Kingdom for a few days on business.
Jingyun will stay with you.
He won't come with me?
Right,
Huangyao is so busy,
how could he possibly abandon his planned business trip
because of my matter?
Okay.
It's only been a few days since Grandma passed,
and there's barely anyone grieving her passing,
yet you are
holding a joyous birthday banquet here!
Are you here to beg your father
to let you come home?
Why bother with her?
She's not family anymore. Get going.
Thank you, everyone,
for coming to my birthday party.
You make me feel like I am
the happiest person in the world!
Tang Xue,
this is a small token of my affection.
Tang Xue, this is a global limited edition, the same
style worn by celebrities!
Thank you, Uncle and Aunt.
Tang Xue, you are so lucky!
Tang Xue is basically a princess,
so isn't it completely
normal for her to have all these things?
Xue'er is the most
precious pearl of the Mu family,
and she deserves
the very best things in the world.
Precisely because she is obedient and filial,
my mother
left her priceless plots of land.
They were all given to her.
Is that so?
The commercial magnates fight tooth and nail,
to get their hands on this prime location.
Tang Xue, you are incredibly blessed.
Tang Xue,
this is the blessing you earned through your filial piety.
Grandma was so good to me,
it is only right that i show my filial devotion.
What a wonderful, devoted daughter you are.
Then why wasn't Grandma's funeral held?
They cremated her the night there was no funeral,
and wouldn't even let me see the body.
Are you afraid that I, a
top student from the medical academy,
would find something out?
Sister, you're here.
I've already kicked you out of the house.
This is not a place where an outsider
like you should be.
I didn't want to come,
but I can no
longer tolerate
what you've done to Grandma.
And Mu Tangxue abused Grandma.
Grandma couldn't possibly have left the land to you.
Sister, I know you are upset,
but that piece of land,
was Grandma's birthday gift
to me.
Mu Tangxue,
do you dare swear on
Grandma's portrait?
Grandma worked her whole life for The Mu family,
and she didn't even get a proper funeral
in the end,
yet here you are fighting over the inheritance.
Sister, are you trying to falsely accuse me?
She bullies Tang Xue at home regularly.
Now she brings a portrait
to ruin her birthday party?
You've crossed the line.
Tang Xue has always been sweet and sensible.
If it's not left to her, should it be left to you?
Do you even want to
be comfortable at school anymore?
You are not welcome here, leave quickly.
Go, go!
Go!
He's back.
I've given you the opportunity.
How will you play this scene?
You've all been fooled by The Mu family.
Mu Tangxue mistreats Grandma,
there's no way Grandma would leave her the inheritance.
How could that be?
Mu Tangxue
has always been known in
Jianchuan for her filial piety.
Has this Mu Qiqi
gone crazy with jealousy over her sister?
Qiqi,
I know you're upset about being
kicked out,
but doing this won't get
you back into The Mu family.
You should leave quickly!
No one here will believe you.
I have no intention of returning to The Mu family,
and I certainly won't let the
inheritance fall into your hands.
You just can't take a hint!
Security!
Miss Tang Xue, the old madam's meal is ready.
Shall I send it over?
That old hag still expects to eat?
Let her starve.
Isn't that inappropriate?
That old thing protects Mu Qiqi every day.
She should just drop dead sooner. Do as I say!
Is this who you call the "perfect
little girl"?
Let me tell you,
I have plenty more videos on my phone.
They all prove
your disgusting two-faced personality,
Mu Tangxue.
She's so wicked.
How could she be so harsh to her own grandmother!
You really can't dig too deep into these wealthy families.
This whole "perfect girl"
image of Mu Tangxue
is just an act.
Dad,
Mom,
that video is fake.
Please believe me!
Mu Qiqi,
you came here making such a scene.
Are you trying to scheme for
your grandmother's inheritance, too?
I don't need to.
Because Grandma's will is right here with me.
Because Grandma's will is with me.
You're so young and already getting into trouble,
how dare you forge a will?
Is there no law and order anymore?
It was left to me by Grandma,
I didn't forge it.
You're still lying?
Lawyer Yao!
Mr. Mu.
This one is the real will.
How can there be two wills?
Making a will is a major thing,
it's impossible for Old Madam Mu
to only give it to Mu Qiqi,
the one she has must be fake.
The one he has is the fake one.
Tang Xue mistreated Grandma,
Grandma wouldn't leave her the inheritance.
Lawyer Yao, tell this rebellious daughter.
The document my client holds
is completely legally binding,
and is a fair and authentic will.
Old Madam Mu
did not execute any other wills.
Mu Qiqi, you are absolutely absurd.
In front of so many people,
you're using a fake will
to try and seize the family fortune.
I can't indulge you any longer.
Security,
take her to the police station.
Lawyer Yao, forging a will is a serious crime,
don't you care about
your professional career?
Miss Qi.
I stand by my words,
under my professional oath as a lawyer.
Take her away for me.
Well, this is quite the show.
It's Sheng Xiao, it's Sheng Xiao.
What is Sheng Xiao doing here?
Sheng Xiao,
is this The Sheng family's
idea of manners?
Hiding here and poaching someone's talent?
Manners? I don't really have those.
Besides, I just sent a
Member of the
Mu family away last month.
I didn't expect someone else
to lose control so quickly.
Sheng Xiao, you are simply too audacious!
I always am.
You should get used to it.
Jingyun!
Why aren't you letting go?
Get out!
Qiqi,
the lawyer just said
that the will you are holding is fake.
Why are you still insisting it's real?
It is!
You rebellious girl, you are still lying!
And you!
This is a matter concerning The Mu family.
You, an outsider, have no right
to interfere!
You said not to interfere,
but I've interfered many times before.
Today, I intend to watch this drama of
putting justice above family loyalty!
Qiqi, produce the evidence!
Sister, stop being so willful.
You're just jealous that the
whole family treats me well,
and you want to make my life miserable, don't you?
Let's see what else you can do to fight me!
I know you too well.
The will you just tore up
was only a copy.
Enough!
It's my fault as a mother for favoring
Tang Xue.
Please stop targeting her.
Even if you are jealous, it won't help.
If you have an issue, come at me!
She may not have the courage, but I do!
Qiqi,
Grandma Lin got your call
and rushed right over.
Don't be afraid, I'm here.
Isn't that the former
chairman of Tiansheng?
A person of high status,
highly respected,
why would she attend this birthday party?
Sheng Xiao can come,
so if another big shot comes,
what's so strange about that?
Aunt Lin, why are you here?
I have nothing to say
to the members of The Mu family.
I came here today
to prove for Qiqi,
that the will in her hand is the real one.
Aunt Lin,
even if you and my mother
were the closest of friends,
with my lawyer present,
you can't make the final decision today.
It was precisely to prevent you
from misappropriating the inheritance that,
when
your mother signed the will,
it was video-recorded entirely,
and three witnesses were present
to notarize the will.
Shortly,
my Tiansheng Group will release the video.
How can this be?
By forging the will,
you will completely lose your right to inherit.
Qishan,
Qishan!
None of you in The Mu family
are good people.
Qiqi is a woman of fortune,
she shouldn't enter a cursed family.
Qiqi, let's go.
Jingyun,
I don't want to see this lawyer
in our city again.
Understood, young master.
Why aren't you following Old Mrs. Lin?
I
would rather follow you.
Don't look at
me with those pitiful,
innocent eyes.
Like a little rabbit.
I'm
afraid you'll think I have ulterior motives,
and won't let me follow you.
Come with me somewhere,
I have some personal business to handle.
Crown Prince,
I didn't intentionally try to trick you and
cause the accident on the track.
It was my sister,
who urgently needs a heart transplant,
I needed the money too much, that's why I made the mistake.
Your hand or your foot?
Crown Prince, I beg you,
I'll bow down to you,
I will never dare to do it again.
I survived by a hair's breadth on the track,
I'll take one of your legs,
consider it repayment to me.
Jingyun,
find a heart for his sister,
and pay the medical expenses.
Yes, Young Master.
I finally understand
why so many people follow him.
Thank you, Crown Prince,
Thank you, Crown Prince,
I will serve you faithfully from now on,
I will serve you faithfully from now on,
I'll be at your beck and call.
Brother,
shouldn't you give
me an explanation?
Mu Corporation's cash flow stopped recently, and
I was trying to sell the
land quickly to cover this deficit.
Who knew Mum would leave the
land to Mu Qiqi?
My sister must be too cunning.
She must have manipulated Grandma to
deceive her out of the inheritance.
If you had raised Mu Qiqi
properly, this wouldn't have happened now.
You try to guard against everything,
but a betrayal from within is the hardest to prevent.
You!
Dad, Second Uncle,
please stop arguing.
I have a way to bring my sister back.
Mu Xue,
you can talk your sister into coming back?
Dad, my sister has to go to school, right?
I'll go find her at school.
Since Xue'er is personally going to persuade her,
I believe Qiqi will come to her senses.
She's causing such a fuss,
isn't it just because she wants to come home?
As long as she brings the inheritance back
and admits her mistake,
I will give her another chance.
Dad, I will definitely bring my sister back.
Mu Qiqi, I don't care if you die outside,
but you must cough up that inheritance for me.
What is this?
These are gifts from the young ladies of
those noble families for the young master.
He doesn't want them?
No one is good enough for him, take
a look.
What's wrong?
Do you want to send me a gift too?
Getting up so early,
is it to give me a present?
No, it's not.
Then what are you hiding behind your back?
Nothing at all.
Really?
Let me see.
Absolutely nothing?
Nothing at all.
I told you there wasn't anything.
I saw it just now.
Are you going to give it to me or should I take it myself?
I'll give it to you, here.
Such an ugly cufflink,
did you make it yourself?
If you don't want it, give it back to me.
Give it back!
I'll keep it.
Didn't you say you wouldn't accept gifts?
You need to go to class.
Isn't your sister attending the
same university as you?
Aren't you afraid she'll cause trouble for you?
I'm not scared anymore.
Such big improvement.
I know you'll be backing me up.
How do you know that?
I just do.
Eating shredded pork in fish sauce,
Mu Qiqi, you are a murderer,
how dare you still show
your face in this sacred university campus,
you are absolutely shameless.
The real culprit
seems to be Mu Tangxue, standing right
next to you, right?
Haven't you figured that out?
Still lying here.
If you didn't cause your grandma's passing,
why would you have been kicked out of the house?
Mu Qiqi was actually thrown out
of her home!
Mu Qiqi has such a terrible reputation,
if I were her mom, I would
also favor the talented Mu Tangxue.
Sister, look how many people are here,
why don't
we find another place to catch
up?
Do you remember
that abandoned teaching building?
Sister,
stop using Grandma as an
excuse to steal my things,
it makes me very unhappy.
Ah!
It smells awful here,
let's hurry up and leave.
Can she please just drop out?
I don't
ever want to see her again.
Did you hear that?
I spilled
urine on you in the teaching building last time,
and I want to do it again.
If you can't tolerate it anymore, you don't have to keep tolerating it.
Mu Qiqi, Mu Qiqi, you're crazy!
You like having water thrown on you, right?
I'll give you plenty!
What are you doing, Mu Qiqi?
You've lost it!
Stay back, if you come any closer I'll drown her.
In the future,
I can't promise
what I might do next.
Mu Qiqi!
Are you trying to seriously harm someone?
The rest of you, come over here immediately.
What's going on?
Principal, I…
I didn't ask you.
Principal, I didn't do anything.
My sister just pushed me into the water.
You started by bullying me first,
locked me on the rooftop,
and even threw liquid on me!
Sister, you're my own sister!
I never did those things to you.
I don't believe in fabrications.
I only believe the
facts I just witnessed.
Is it that you don't believe me,
or that you think I have no one to back me up?
Mu Qiqi,
how dare you speak to me like that?
Starting today,
you are expelled from Shengting.
On what grounds?
Principal,
let me
call my parents first,
and let them handle this.
Maybe don't
expel my sister yet?
All this phony concern!
It looks like this whole incident
is still about the inheritance.
I'd like to see
what other tricks you plan to pull.
Fine, then
let's call your parents over first.
Go ahead, you call your parents,
and I'll call mine.
Call them! Go do it now!
I'd really like to see
who you can drag out here.
She's not
actually going to call her poor
aunt, is she?
Who else could it be?
Principal, look at her.
Hello.
Sheng Xiao,
I…
I messed up.
What did you mess up?
I pushed Mu Tangxue into the water,
and the Principal caught me red-handed.
Well done,
Xiaoqi.
But the Principal said I have no backing.
Then you tell him,
expel me if you want to.
It's just some crummy school,
what's so great about staying there?
Wait there.
Xue'er, are you okay?
Mom and Dad,
please hurry and beg the principal,
ask him to let my sister off the hook.
Principal,
what exactly happened here?
Mu Qiqi publicly held Mu
Tangxue underwater.
If I hadn't arrived in time,
was Mu Qiqi trying to seriously harm her?
Shengting
cannot tolerate students with poor character.
You should take her away now.
Disobedient child!
What, you want to hit me in public?
You are no longer my father,
you have no right to lay a hand on me.
Look, look, look!
This is her arrogant and entitled
attitude!
Qiqi, I know
the reason you are doing this
is because you want to get
mine and your father's attention,
isn't that right?
Principal, my sister
just had a moment of madness.
That's why she pushed me into the water.
Could you please be lenient with her just this once,
and let her go?
Stop the act. I'm not going back to The Mu family.
Sister, why don't you just apologize?
You still need to be in school.
Let me tell you something:
I can skip this school year,
but I won't put up with this injustice.
Mu Qiqi,
you would rather be expelled
than go back home?
My grandmother passed away.
I don't have a home anymore.
All the people who cared about me are gone.
You!
Fine, fine, fine.
You refuse to admit your mistake, do you?
Then I will expel you publicly,
and give Tang Xue some closure.
If Mu Qiqi doesn't go home,
how will Dad get the inheritance back?
No, Principal, please don't!
Good.
I hope none of you live to regret this.
What's going on here?
I heard Mu Qiqi from the
Medical School pressed her own sister under water.
Seriously?
I heard that Mu Qiqi

and he will use even more
tactics to force me to comply.
Are you scared?
Not at all. With my husband's abilities,
I'm not scared.
What abilities?
The power to execute swift justice?
Stop talking nonsense.
Young Master,
Young Master,
the Master has been sent to the hospital.
All the Members of the Sheng family have gone.
Oh.
Then the real drama is about to unfold.
Grandpa,
Grandpa, are you okay?
What did Lao Ba do to make you so angry?
If Lao Ba really did
this for the daughter of an enemy,
and made Grandpa sick enough to be hospitalized,
wouldn't that be going too far?
Does he really think Huangyao can't function without him?
Send out the notice.
Effective today,
Sixth Brother will take over as President of Huangyao,
and Sheng Xiao is out of Huangyao.
Grandpa,
in recent years, The Sheng family
has only produced one brilliant talent, Lao Ba.
In just a few years,
he led Huangyao to become the top company in Asia.
He gives much and receives little,
and constantly has to
clean up the messes for his siblings.
What you are doing,
isn't it a bit unfair?
Fourth Sister, he was already given the status
of the heir apparent.
What more does he want?
You don't seriously think
managing Huangyao
only requires the title of heir apparent, do you?
If you truly believe in Sixth Brother, that's fine,
but i want to see how capable he really is.
As long as
Sheng Xiao doesn't break up with Mu Qiqi,
he can forget
about stepping foot inside Huangyao's gates.
You have an exam this afternoon,
so stop reading novels.
It's Chairman Lin, our partner.
Hello?
President Sheng,
why did Huangyao suddenly change presidents?
If we can't work with you,
then there's no need for us to continue.
If you want to terminate the contract, go ahead.
Or,
i can introduce you to
an even better supplier.
Here we go again.
No more exclusive counters.
No more events.
Just stepping away like that,
is it really okay?
I have to step away,
otherwise my grandfather would genuinely believe i
relied on Huangyao all these years.
The reason he's doing this
is simply because he wants us to break up.
Is there anything
I can help you with?
Pick up my phone for me,
and cherish me well.
What are you doing?
I will cherish you well.
I'll be somewhere you can always see,
I won't distract you,
and no one will ever separate us.
If you keep flirting with me,
you won't be going to class this afternoon.
Keep the meeting with
Secretary He discreet.
Also,
I'm putting you in charge of the
safety of Qiqi and
my aunt recently.
Oh,
Young Master,
once the military industrial group with
Secretary He is established,
you really won't be able to return to The Sheng family.
I never planned on turning back.
I've been arguing with the Old Master recently
just to give him
some time to adjust.
If I had truly left immediately,
it wouldn't have been as simple as
just going to the hospital.
A person of
your capability shouldn't be confined to Huangyao;
you can create even greater value.
Go handle it.
Ugly.
Little thing,
it was only after meeting you
that I truly understood
the importance of responsibility.
Grandpa,
after the news about
the change in Huangyao's management was released,
the contract cancellation rate reached forty percent.
On the Sixth Brother's
first day in office, he tried contacting partners,
but no one paid him any attention at all.
Furthermore,
he can only complete one third
of Lao Ba's basic workload
in a day.
You overestimate him.
He can't even handle
Lao Ba's basic duties properly.
The Crown Prince of Huangyao—
how easy is it to be one?
Go help him out.
He's just unfamiliar with the business,
once he gets the hang of it in a few days,
operations will naturally return to normal.
Grandpa, please just give in to Lao Ba,
he simply fell in love
with a girl.
His marriage does not belong to him alone;
it belongs to The Sheng family.
Stop talking nonsense,
go quickly.
Yes, Grandpa.
For the daughter of an enemy,
that wretched person actually forced me to this point.
I absolutely won't let him succeed.
Lao Ba is intentionally causing me trouble,
making the German partners pull
out of the collaboration.
If he keeps interfering,
how am I supposed to manage Huangyao?
As far as I know,
Lao Ba doesn't have the time to
meddle in your affairs.
Why are you siding with Lao Ba?
He is the one who caused this harm to Grandpa.
Hello, Fourth Sister.
Lao Ba,
do you know about the German partners
pulling out of the cooperation?
No, and I don't care to know.
It took you
so long to establish that network,
and now it'll all be for nothing.
Huangyao's revenue for the second half
will also drastically decrease.
Whatever. It's not my company,
so I won't worry about it.
If there's nothing else,
I'm hanging up now.
I hear you. You're just incompetent;
you couldn't convince the partners.
How can you blame Lao Ba?
It's never been that Grandpa
cannot do without Sheng Xiao;
it's that Huangyao cannot do without Sheng Xiao.
Tell him to bring Mu Qiqi to see me.
Nervous, are we,
Qiqi?
No matter what conflict happens between the
old man and me later,
don't say a word,
and certainly don't interfere.
Is that okay?
Let's go.
Grandpa.
Hello, Grandpa.
Go back to Huangyao and stabilize the situation first.
I can,
but you must first acknowledge
the relationship between Qier and me.
This is absolutely outrageous!
Why does it have
to be her?
If you already know it's outrageous,
then we can talk business.
Grandpa, listen to me,
Qier is my bottom line.
If you upset my
dearest treasure,
I won't let you have
a comfortable life either.
The only one who can match you
is the Eldest Miss Gu.
I'll compromise one step;
you can keep her as a mistress.
The moment you uttered those words,
there's no saving
this relationship between us.
Lao Ba,
my birthday is in half a month.
Whether you like it or not,
I will publicly announce the good news
of your marriage alliance with the Gu Group.
Okay, I've been dropped off.
You should go back now,
otherwise I'll be late.
Bye.
Oh my gosh!
Isn't that Mu Qiqi from forensic medicine,
kissing The Heir of
Glory Group?
Aren't these two families sworn enemies?
Are they really breaking
all the rules right here at school?
Being so obvious, aren't you afraid?
Nope, I'm not afraid.
My Sheng Xiao
just wants to declare his ownership, I don't mind at all.
Don't let grandfather's words scare you.
I won't.
My husband,
however, is supposed
to enter into an arranged marriage at grandfather's birthday.
That might work for
other heirs,
but there's already an extra name
on my household registry now.
That day,
I think it will be the perfect time to announce it publicly.
Go on, go to class.
Mhm.
Studying is so boring.
Tonight,
you can teach me something else.
Who was it yesterday leaning on my shoulder,
begging me to stop?
Oh,
that's just nonsense!
We're at school, don't talk about that!
I'm going,
I'm going.
Congrats, Qiqi!
Snagging The Heir of Glory Group,
that's incredible!
Snagged the Crown Prince? What are you talking about?
The Sheng family
is about to form a marriage alliance with The Gu family.
What kind of Crown Princess does she think she is?
Exactly.
Our family has already received the invitation.
The Crown Prince is
going to marry the daughter of The Gu family.
Mu Qiqi is nothing more than a plaything.
Crown Princess or not,
plaything or whatever,
if I ask President Sheng
to deal with the two of you,
that should be more than enough, shouldn't it?
You!
Just wait until you become
the laughingstock of the entire city.
Even if you try every trick in the book
to get into the Crown Prince's bed,
The Sheng family won't accept you.
Fine, I really look forward to it.
Grandpa.
Lao Ba hasn't agreed to
the marriage with The Gu
family. By doing this,
are you truly unafraid of disheartening Lao Ba?
I gave him status and honor,
so he must follow my arrangements.
If he doesn't want to get married,
then he must get out of here,
get out of The Sheng family.
Can he really give that up?
Fourth Sister,
if you don't want to see Zi
Ling become our sister-in-law,
you can leave,
but don't be a spoilsport here, alright?
Sixth Brother,
Lao Ba hasn't left this
seat yet,
sitting here today,
isn't that inappropriate?
Miss Gu, you don't need to worry about her.
We are very welcome to
have you as Lao Ba's wife.
If Sixth Brother likes
Miss Gu so much,
why don't you marry her yourself?
Sheng Xiao,
what rubbish are you talking about?
Old Master, please don't be angry,
Sheng Xiao, you need
a wife who is a perfect match,
and I am your best choice.
Miss Gu,
I've never met you before.
What makes you think I would marry you?
Let me tell you,
I am already married.
Are you truly married?
Are you blind? Can't you see?
So what if you come from a prestigious family?
Without my permission,
you run around
parading as my fiancée.
Have you no shame?
My actual wife
isn't running around showing off.
Who do you think you are?
Sheng Xiao,
you unfilial son!
Since
you are so unappreciative,
don't blame me for being ruthless.
Starting today,
you are no longer a descendant of The Sheng family.
I want to see, without The Sheng family,
what
you are good for?
The things you just said,
are you trying to cut ties with me?
Are you begging me to take back my command?
No,
I'm afraid you'll regret it.
If you leave The Sheng family today,
even if you come crawling back later,
don't ever think I will forgive you!
Get out, get out of here!
Didn't you hear him? Get lost!
President Sheng is here
today as the CEO of Zongteng.
What?
The newly established company,
the rising enterprise with a military background?
Dismiss Jingyun.
Sheng Xiao and my wife will take our leave.
Lao Ba!
Have you
been wanting to leave The Sheng family for a long time?
Yes!
Alright, this is far enough.
I'm going abroad for advanced studies,
it's not like I'm never coming back.
Auntie, you must remember
to come back and see me often!
Okay. How about this?
When I return,
the two of you should have a baby,
and I'll help you raise them.
Oh, Auntie.
Aunt,
I promise to take good care of Xiaoqi for you.
I believe that.
For the past year or so,
you have spoiled her rotten,
and she's become much more mature and composed.
If you ask me,
she's the one who got the better deal.
I think so too.
Alright,
I'm leaving. Don't see me off anymore.
Travel safely.
Take care.
Bye-bye.
Honey,
quick, take me to the hospital,
I have a meeting to attend.
A meeting?
Another meeting?
I think that professor of yours,
he's always looking at you
in a creepy way during class.
That's not true.
He is a highly respected professor.
Respected? How respected is he really?
Is he more respected than me?
Hmph.
Why don't I go study something,
like medicine,
and work in your place?
Then I could give you injections myself.
Don't talk nonsense.
We are a loving married couple,
but at the same time,
we are independent individuals.
I remember during
every night shift I had,
he would sit in the car,
silently waiting while reading files.
I also remember coming home smelling terrible,
and the first thing he'd do
was give me an understanding
hug.
Last time when we were at home,
what did you say to me?
You dared to try and take off this Young Master's pants.
What gives you the right to control me?
Let go of me!
You're upset.
How did you know that?
It's the instinct of someone who loves you.
Say that again.
Come on, say it again.
Let's just say
the dowry Grandma prepared for us,
even if we separate later,
I will still have my dignity.
Say that again!
Separate?
Don't even think about it.
You are my glory.

title: Revenge of the Reborn Heiress: Disowned, I Awakened My Divine Power & Bankrupted My Family Overnight
description: Betrayed and left for dead by the cruel family who stole her identity, a powerful ancient goddess is reborn into the body of a wronged heiress. She abandons her rich, toxic relatives and finds a new home with a poor but loving family who once saved her. Now, she's on a mission of divine revenge. Using her secret identity and supernatural powers, she crushes her enemies, elevates her new family from rags to riches, and catches the eye of a handsome CEO she saved from a coma. They thought she was

subtitle.text:
I have no name, no surname.
The cultivation world calls me Grand Ancestor.
The mortal world calls me Miss.
My cultivation is already complete.
I only need to pass the final trial to ascend.
I've waited two hundred years.
The final trial is finally here.
Very well, enter the mortal world to resolve your karma.
Your nature is detached, you fear nothing.
You must form familial bonds in the mortal world.
Only then can you ascend.
We respectfully see you off, Miss.
Two hundred years ago,
you left a drop of your essence blood in the mortal world,
which transformed into a human,
so you could use the identity of this descendant.
I heard there's a Qing Dynasty tomb nearby.
There must be a lot of good treasures inside.
Blood—!
It's just a corpse.
Look at you, you coward.
Hahahahahaha...
Oh oh oh oh oh...
Let me see your familial trial.
You were born an heiress to a wealthy family,
but the fake heiress stole your place.
The fake heiress, relying on their doting,
snatched the original owner's fiancé.
But after the fiancé's car accident
left him in a vegetative state,
she forced the original owner to marry in her place.
Unfilial descendants.
The spiritual energy in this world is so thin,
not even one ten-thousandth of my power remains.
Cheng Wuyin, where the hell did you go!
So this is the familial trial.
I must sever the flawed karmic ties
and also obtain true familial love.
Come on,
this way, be careful.
Brother Shen, you already have a heart condition.
You've been working all morning, take a break.
My third son is about to take his grad school entrance exams.
I need to save more money.
Born in a Yin year, Yin month, and Yin hour.
His fate is the same as the original owner's father.
And he once saved the original owner's life.
Hey! Brother, watch out!
Huh? Am I seeing things?
Are you looking for a daughter?
I'll be your daughter.
I can't believe I actually brought the Eldest Miss home.
Eldest Miss, back when I was working for the Cheng family,
saving you was just a coincidence.
Besides, my leg is fine now.
You don't have to be my daughter.
How about I take you back to the Cheng family?
It's fine. I like your destiny.
But... but my family is poor.
My oldest delivers food,
my second is a background actor,
and my third is still in school.
You and President Cheng are family, after all.
Even if they favor the Second Miss,
you can't erase a blood connection.
You don't want me as your daughter?
Oh, of course not!
Our house is like a monastery of men.
I... I've always dreamed of having a daughter.
That's settled then.
I told him last time to fix this door.
It must be Yanxiu.
That kid has been slacking off.
Wait a moment.
I need a set of furniture delivered to...
I've never raised a daughter.
I hope the Eldest Miss won't mind?
Eldest Miss, we've delivered
the latest full set of furniture
and appliances. The total is 1.27 million.
Uh, Eldest Miss,
I... I don't have that much money.
Put it on Cheng Shichuan's account.
Okay.
My god, this big fridge,
color TV, washing machine,
these are all the latest models!
Oh, yeah.
Doesn't the Shen family live on scraps?
Where did they get this money?
You know, Old Shen is usually so poor,
he's just a laborer.
E-Eldest Miss,
for me to suddenly receive such a great favor from you...
You don't have to call me Eldest Miss.
From now on, you are my dad.
Honey, did you see?
I have a daughter now!
Miss Cheng,
all the items have been placed.
Ouch!
Hey, bro,
what should we eat for lunch...
It's you!
Dad!
What are you doing here?
Don't talk to the Eldest Miss like that!
From now on, the Eldest Miss will live with us.
She's your sister.
Eldest Miss,
this is the eldest, Shen Yanxiu.
This is the second, Shen Zijiao.
They are all good people.
It seems I won't have to bother teaching them.
Dad, are you kidding?
Did you forget that last time you saved her,
your leg was almost crippled!
And her? Not a single word of thanks.
She even got you fired!
Dad, even if you want a daughter that badly,
you don't have to take her.
Ahh!
Miss Cheng! Oh my!
Ouch! Ouch! Ah!
Shen Dayong is just a servant in our house.
If Mom and Dad find out
you stole their money,
they'll definitely cut off his treatment
and let his whole family starve!
Don't tell Mom and Dad.
I won't see them again. Hmph!
Eldest Miss Cheng is a pampered lady.
We poor people are not worthy.
Please stop toying with us.
You're not even worth my time to toy with.
I'm here to become your family.
Family?
Look at my home,
we're dirt poor,
struggling at the bottom of society,
never knowing what tomorrow will bring.
Don't tell me,
you're giving up your life as a wealthy heiress
to come here and experience life.
What if I said yes?
Fine, even if you've lost your mind,
a rich person becoming poor,
experiencing life, why choose us?
Dad, if you ask me,
she was sent by Cheng Shichuan.
Dad, just think about it,
how badly the Cheng family screwed over big brother before.
They're the type to take a needle from us
and make us pay back an acre of land.
I believe the Eldest Miss won't harm us.
Dad!
What kind of potion did she give you?
She's a thankless wolf!
Dad! I told you!
Don't you dare speak ill of the Eldest Miss!
Dad! Dad!
Arrhythmia, it's heart disease.
Take three pills from this bottle, and you'll recover.
What's with the fake concern!
You're the one who angered Dad!
What kind of look is that?
I actually feel like kneeling to her.
Dad,
did you go to the construction site again?
I told you your health is poor,
you can't do heavy labor.
I'll take you to the hospital.
He won't make it to the hospital.
If you take him away, you're sending him to his death.
Stop your fear-mongering!
This bottle of medicine doesn't even have a label.
Who knows what's inside?
Is it poisonous?
Hey,
making Dad take your medicine is what will really harm him!
Cheng Shichuan wants to crush me,
so come at me,
don't drag my dad into this. Go!
You can either believe me,
or watch him die.
Dad...
Dad! Dad! Cheng Wuyin!
If anything happens to my dad,
I will never let you go!
Dad! Dad!
You can't die!
Mom and Dad passed away early.
You, by yourself,
raised the three of us through hardship.
You haven't enjoyed a single day of peace yet!
Dad! You can't die! Dad!
Dad, stop crying.
I'm not dead yet.
Dad!
Are you okay?
Hey!
I'm not out of breath anymore,
and my chest feels warm.
My leg doesn't hurt anymore either!
Dad, how is that possible?
You fell from upstairs,
even the doctors said it was incurable.
My leg really doesn't hurt anymore.
Look, I can even... hey hey hey!
Eldest Miss,
I know it's because I took your medicine.
Thank you for saving my life, Eldest Miss.
You are my dad.
You don't need to kneel to me.
Did you see?
The Eldest Miss saved me!
Without the Eldest Miss, you wouldn't have a dad!
You two,
if you're disrespectful to the Eldest Miss again,
then you can disown me.
I've never seen this medicine before.
Is it new on the market?
No, I refined it myself.
You... you refined it yourself?
Doesn't the news say Cheng Wuyin is stupid and wicked,
a total idiot?
You... how old are you?
How many years have you studied medicine?
Too long, I don't remember.
Probably... a few thousand years.
A few thousand years?
Eldest Miss Cheng,
we're just poor,
not stupid.
You don't have to be nervous.
I'm here to undergo my trial.
Once I've accumulated enough merit, I will leave.
In return,
I will grant each of you a great opportunity.
Undergo a trial? Great opportunity?
Why do I feel like she might be...
a little off up here.
I heard she almost drowned before.
It might be due to lack of oxygen.
Living in her own fantasy.
That's possible.
Don't talk nonsense!
The Eldest Miss was switched at birth.
As a wealthy heiress,
she wasn't welcomed by the Cheng family.
It's pitiful enough.
Now that she's come to our home,
we must give her the best.
Then Dad...
Big brother, this Cheng Wuyin situation
must be dealt with.
She's just spoiled.
Is sister okay?
Zhang Ma,
Mingzhu isn't feeling well.
Go make some of that nourishing porridge from last time.
Young Master, I don't know how to make that porridge.
You don't know how?
Then who made it when Mom was sick last time?
It was the Eldest Miss. She had a cold and no appetite,
so the Eldest Miss took leave from school
and spent all afternoon in the kitchen making it.
Zhang Ma, are the red dates, barley, goji berries,
and lily bulbs all soaked?
Yes, Eldest Miss.
Aren't you going to class?
If you do poorly on the final exams,
Madam will be unhappy.
It's okay, the worst that can happen is I'll get scolded a bit.
Mom's health is the most important thing.
Mom, sister didn't come back all night.
She must be unwilling to marry Young Master Tan.
Why don't I marry him instead?
After all, I'm just the adopted daughter.
A girl staying out all night,
she really is from the countryside, no manners.
Mingzhu, don't worry.
Your second brother will never let you
marry that living corpse.
Cheng Wuyin, don't push your luck!
So I didn't save
you?
I'll apologize.
Hurry up and come home!
Mingzhu is waiting for you to marry in her place!
She blocked me.
Sister actually blocked you?
Young Master, Happiness Home Furnishings said
the Eldest Miss spent 1.27 million on furniture
and charged it to your account.
1.27 million? What furniture did she buy that's so expensive?
Isn't she usually quite stingy?
Why is she spending the family's money now?
Sister couldn't be trying to cash out
and run away, right?
Freeze all her cards immediately!
Send out a notice.
Cheng Corporation and all its affiliates
are not to charge anything to her account.
Once she's used to the luxurious life,
without money, she'll naturally come crawling back.
This body has been malnourished for a long time,
with severe loss of vital essence.
I can only cultivate twice as hard to nourish and recover.
Come in.
Here, there's three thousand in the card.
Consider it living expenses.
If my dad hadn't told me to take care of you,
I couldn't be bothered.
Wait.
I see a hint of nobility in your brow.
You should have a fate of great wealth and honor.
How did you end up delivering food?
You have the nerve to ask!
You should go ask your dear brother.
Cheng Shichuan! Cheng Shichuan!
Get out here!
Cheng Shichuan!
You're shameless! Using Wang Jiaojiao
to steal my core technology!
Give my technology back!
Did anyone see me steal your technology?
I saw it.
The poor have no money, no power, no resources.
You should just accept your fate.
By the way, don't even think about calling the police.
We'll see if the police believe you,
or my technical team.
Cheng Shichuan! Cheng Shichuan! Something's happened!
So,
his core technology was stolen by Cheng Shichuan,
leading him to be saddled with huge debt.
This kind of idiot needs to be taught a lesson.
I-I'm so sorry.
Your milk tea is here.
Isn't this my ex-boyfriend,
the loser Shen Yanxiu?
Everyone, come take a look!
The rising star of the tech world, Shen Yanxiu,
has been reduced to delivering food!
Well,
Shen Yanxiu, what a rare sight.
Oh, he's the one who plagiarized President Cheng,
the Shen Yanxiu who was sued into bankruptcy by President Cheng.
He still has the nerve to show his face at Cheng Corp?
Him, if I were him,
I would've just bashed my head against a wall and died!
Hahaha...
Not only did I use your technology to make money,
I also slept with your woman.
The thing you worked so hard to develop,
ended up being my ticket to success.
How should I thank you?
You've delivered the milk tea,
I'll be leaving now.
Don't be in such a hurry to leave.
You want to hit me? Go ahead.
Last time, I just made you go bankrupt.
If you dare touch me,
I'll send you to jail.
If you won't slap him,
I'll do it for you!
Cheng Wuyin, where the hell have you been!
Don't you know
Mingzhu is waiting for you to marry in her place!
To defend me,
she actually slapped her own brother in public.
Does she really see me as family?
You dare hit me!
Unfilial descendant.
Hitting you would indeed dirty my hands.
Come here!
So,
no wonder you were unwilling to marry in her place
and even dared to run away from home.
It turns out you've been fooling around with this pretty boy.
President Cheng,
please be more respectful to your sister!
Every word out of your mouth is filth.
Is this the upbringing of the Cheng family?
What did you call her? Sister?
I'm your brother!
Cut ties with him right now
and get your ass back to the Cheng family!
Otherwise, don't blame me for disowning you!
You stole someone else's technology,
forcing them into bankruptcy.
That is truly an act against heaven.
I'll give you two choices as well.
First, give him back the technology.
Second, compensate him for his losses.
Choose.
The court already ruled.
He plagiarized me!
In the code you stole,
there is a fatal flaw.
In three minutes at most,
this system will crash.
How does she know the system has a flaw?
Young Master, she must be
lying to you. Shen Yanxiu told me
this system is perfect.
A flaw?
Country bumpkin,
do you even know what code is?
Alright, stop throwing a tantrum.
I shouldn't have only saved Mingzhu and not you.
One minute left.
Give you an inch and you take a mile, huh?
If you keep spouting this nonsense,
don't even think I'll
help you with the marriage substitution again!
President Cheng, this is bad!
The program has an error,
the system crashed!
Where is the tech department?
Are they useless!
They can't fix it either.
We're losing millions every second.
President Cheng, what should we do?
Nonsense! Get out!
The market value of your system is ten million.
For him to fix the flaw for you,
Ten million? That's robbery!
Even if he gave me ten million,
I wouldn't help him!
Twenty million.
Cheng Wuyin, I'm your brother!
I'll give you a hundred thousand,
have him fix it for me immediately!
Thirty million.
Don't push it!
Forty...
Thirty million it is.
What are you waiting for? Send the money!
Alipay payment received: thirty million yuan.
It actually arrived?
Thirty million?
Why is she helping me?
Now can you let him go fix it?
Not yet, you two apologize to him.
Me, apologize to him?
Is he worthy!

You're not qualified yet.
She actually rejected
Master Qiyuan!
That's the master I've dreamed of studying under!
However, my third brother's understanding of painting
is far beyond that of ordinary people.
You are barely qualified to be his master.
Although the brushwork in this painting is a bit amateurish,
the artistic conception is acceptable.
If he is willing to study diligently,
he will definitely have great achievements in the future.
Are you willing to be my last disciple?
I... I am willing!
President,
the results of the exhibition are already out.
Cheng Hui is first place.
According to the rules, he
should be your first choice for a disciple.
That's right, Master Qiyuan,
please take a look at my third brother's painting.
No need to look.
I'm not first.
Shen Qiming is.
I admit defeat.
Elder Lin took my
family's money, which is why he strongly recommended
me for first place.
Shen Qiming deserves the title.
I have repeatedly emphasized
that accepting disciples and participating in exhibitions must be fair,
open, and just.
How dare you engage in backroom deals!
I announce your permanent expulsion!
Someone! Throw him out!
President!
President, have mercy!
President, if I'm expelled from the association,
how will I survive in the future?
You're not completely hopeless.
Qiyuan...
Master was about to accept you as his disciple.
What are you going crazy for now?
Hey, hey, this child is just talking nonsense.
Wuyin, can you ask the master
to also accept your third brother?
It wouldn't hurt you, right?
I've said it before, I will not interfere with karma.
He can become a disciple because Third Brother is outstanding enough.
Hey, Weiying,
even I, as your father, am begging you,
okay?
You're even willing to help a third brother you just met,
why can't you help
your own third brother?
The family's shares,
the manor, the company, we can give it all to you.
You can't destroy our only hope.
Ah!
Are you still mad at Mingzhu?
Mingzhu, hurry up and kneel before your sister!
Mom, you want me to kneel to her?
On what grounds?
Oh, Grandpa said,
she is the ancestor.
If she's gone,
the Cheng family is finished.
Besides, it's for your third brother!
No! How can you even believe this?
That fake master from last time
was a master of metaphysics,
and she defeated him.
She's not a normal person at all.
And she's not Cheng Wuyin!
You're right.
I am indeed not Cheng Wuyin.
Dad, Mom, Brother,
you all heard her.
She admitted it!
The real Cheng Wuyin
died on the day she fell into the water.
And I am just borrowing her body to transcend a tribulation.
Just as Cheng Wenchang said,
after many years in seclusion,
I have returned.
Now you understand.
Wuyin...
Wuyin is dead?
You're lying to me!
You're standing right in front of me, alive and well!
I'm not even fighting for the disciple spot anymore.
Why are you still lying to me?!
If you pay attention,
you should be able to find
some traces of Cheng Wuyin
in the Cheng family home.
Her disappointment in you
was never instantaneous.
It only erupted after she had had enough.
Now we can proceed with the discipleship ceremony. Ah... y-yes.
Third Brother has been studying painting for many years.
With his Soaring Dragon in the Sky move,
I specially prepared a
grand discipleship banquet,
and also this glazed color-mixing dish,
as your discipleship gift.
Thank...
you, Young Master Tan! We're all family,
no need to be so polite.
The venue was found on short notice,
it's a bit small.
I hope Miss Wuyin doesn't mind.
You've been thoughtful.
Such a grand gesture and he still thinks it's small?
Who on earth is he?
Third Young Master is a master painter.
This old servant
has specially presented a treasured celadon inkstone of black jade,
wishing that Third Young Master's brushstrokes will be as if guided by the gods.
Young Miss, I have prepared a
Star-Plucking wolf-hair brush for Third Young Master.
With a heavenly white jade holder,
a purple sandalwood shaft,
congratulations to Third Young Master on finding a famous master.
Third Young Master's ink washes are grand.
My congratulatory gift is Snow Wave and Colorful Clouds Xuan paper,
which is most suitable for painting.
Hmph!
How dare you present a pile of scrap paper!
Young Miss, look at mine!
This is Hundred-Color Fragrant Wood,
extremely rare in the world.
It's only been passed down for about a thousand years.
I hope Third Young Master doesn't mind.
This...
Whoa, Big Brother,
this Elder Chen, Elder Zhou, CEO Zhang, CEO Zhao,
these are all legendary figures!
And they all came to give gifts to Third Brother,
and they're all priceless gifts!
This...
this ceremony for Third Brother is too high-class!
You're silly,
they're clearly all here for sister.
Oh.
CEO Tan,
you all know each other.
For my disciple to be able to take Third Brother as his student,
you've really found a treasure.
For Young Miss's third brother to be your disciple,
is truly a slight to Young Miss.
If you can't teach him well,
don't blame me for being impolite. Hmph!
Young Miss,
Member Number 0,
legend says that only the founding ancestor
can be Member Number 0!
Could it be... ah! Forgive Qiyuan for being blind,
I respectfully welcome the return of our Ancestor! Rise.
Accepting him as a disciple depends entirely on his own destiny.
Just teach him well in the future.
I will respectfully follow Ancestor's teachings.
The four great families and CEO Tan gathered at Bao
Ge with tens of billions in congratulatory gifts,
celebrating Shen Qiming
becoming a disciple of Qiyuan.
Tens of billions in gifts?
N-No, impossible!
How could he possibly know such powerful people?
Even the four great families call her Ancestor.
If Wuyin were still alive
If she were our daughter,
all of this would belong to the Cheng family.
Who said Cheng Wuyin is dead?
This is impossible!
She must be lying to me.
Cheng Wuyin is the ancestor,
the ancestor is Cheng Wuyin,
right?
Mom, I found Wuyin's diary.
The ancestor said
that Wuyin died after accumulating enough disappointment.
I don't believe it!
T-Today is November 28th.
I was finally brought home
by my birth parents.
So I'm not an orphan.
I have three older brothers.
I'm so happy.
But...
it seems like they
all love my younger sister a little more.
Dad, Mom, brothers, give me...
It's good that you're back.
It's okay.
I'll study hard.
I'll definitely let them see my shining points.
Hurry up and take her to the hospital!
Quick, get in the car!
Hurry! Oh!
This is so stressful! Let's go, let's go!
There's no room in the car.
You wait here.
Was I really so detestable before?
What... what have I done to my sister...
April 6th,
my sister's fiancé became a vegetable.
My sister cried very sadly,
and I was also very sad.
Because they came to me,
forcing me to marry into the Tan family in my sister's place.
I refused.
That was the first time I said no.
I wanted to fight for myself for once.
I'm not discussing this with you,
I'm informing you.
I... how could I have done such a thing?
May 6th,
this is my first birthday after coming home.
But,
my sister Mingzhu and I fell into the water at the same time,
and they all chose...
No one chose me.
And no one loves me.
May 7th, I hate all of you!
Wuyin,
my Wuyin!
Ah, it was you!
You've been lying to us all along!
You bullied Wuyin,
making us think she was a difficult
and mean person.
How could you be so vicious!
That's not it, Mom.
It's not like that.
It's fake, it's all fake.
Don't believe it!
Wu Yi is no longer one of us.
she's not our sister anymore.
What reason would she have to fake it?
You were the one who bought my confidential documents,
and framed Wuyin.
You don't deserve to be my family!
You gave me a phone call.
It must have been that time.
It was that time.
Something had already happened to her,
and I was still cursing at her.
I even told her to get lost.
I can't believe I trusted you so much.
I never thought you were such a villain.
No wonder when I was in debt,
you weren't willing to lend me money.
How ridiculous,
that I, for an outsider,
would hurt my own sister! Hahaha!
How could I have done such a thing?
How could I have treated her like that?
I shouldn't have forced her to marry in your place, I shouldn't have.
Dad, Mom, brothers, I know I was wrong.
I was just afraid you'd dislike me
for not being your biological child.
I'm sorry,
can I apologize to you all?
I'm begging you,
I did this
all because I was afraid of losing you!
When Wuyin first came back,
we were afraid you'd be sad,
so we treated you even better, and even...
ignored her feelings time and time again.
It was our selfishness and coldness
that killed her with our own hands.
Why?
Why wasn't it you who died?!
If it weren't for the Cheng family's money,
do you really think I'd care about you?!
I was really wrong!
I'm begging you,
you can
treat me as Wuyin's replacement.
I will atone for my sins properly! Ah!
You!
Hello, CEO Cheng,
bad news.
Something's happened with the hundred-billion Blue Mountain project.
It's been halted! Ah!
The higher-ups won't let us continue development.
The tens of billions we invested
are all down the drain!
What?! My life's work!
Dad! Hey, Dad!
What's wrong?
The Cheng family is finished! This time...
it's really over!
It's all your fault!
You unfilial daughter!
Bad news, the old master fell and is in trouble!
He's being revived at the hospital!
Ah! Sir!
Madam, the debt collectors are here!
They want us to pay up!
Hand over the Second Young Master!
Oh, bad news,
bad news, bad news!
Madam, there's trouble at your beauty salon,
it's going to be shut down!
Dad! Dad!
It's all you!
If we hadn't adopted you,
we wouldn't have neglected Wuyin.
Wuyin wouldn't have died, and the
Chengfamily wouldn't have fallen!
You jinx! I really regret it!
Have you had enough of scolding?
The Cheng family is about to be finished.
Cheng Wuyin
Wasn't she driven away by your own hands?
Why is it all my fault?!
So this is your true face.
Was I wrong?
If it weren't for your preconceived notions,
looking down on Cheng Wuyin for being from the countryside,
even my instigation would have been useless.
In the end, you all deserve it.
Ah! Cheng Mingzhu!
My mom raised you with all her heart for so many years,
how dare you hit her!
We,
for a bitch like you,
killed our own sister!
Anyway, your Cheng family is finished too.
Yes, that's right.
I am a bitch!
But how much better are you?
Cheng Wuyin is already dead,
deader than dead!
The one in her body now is the Cheng family's ancestor.
Hahahahahaha!
Call the police, I'm calling the police!
Get her arrested and thrown in jail!
Even if the Cheng family is finished,
I want her to rot in jail!
That's right!
If you hadn't instigated me
to frame Chen Zijiao,
how could I have racked up such a huge gambling debt?!
Before I die, I'll make sure you die first!
I don't want to go to jail!
I won't! Aaaaaah!
Let go! I'm calling the police!
Wuyin! My Wuyin!
She was so filial,
how did I lose her?
This is your new room.
You can live here from now on.
Thank you, Mom.
We're all family,
why say thank you?
Ancestor,
Wuyin's body contains the ancestor.
The ancestor's powers are vast.
She must have a way to save Wuyin.
Right.
We'll go and beg her.
She can definitely bring Wuyin back.
Right, we'll go tomorrow.
We'll go first thing in the morning.
Ancestor, your powers are vast,
you can surely save Wuyin.
Ancestor, we already know we were wrong.
Please save her.
We really want to make it up to her.
We beg the Ancestor to grant our wish.
We beg the Ancestor to grant our wish.
It's my fault.
I was too biased before.
I beg the Ancestor to give me another
chance.
I am willing to trade my life for Wuyin's.
We have already dealt with Cheng Mingzhu.
We won't be so blind in the future.
Ancestor, have mercy!
As long as sister can come back,
I'm willing to do anything.
We beg the Ancestor to return Wuyin to us!
We beg the Ancestor to return Wuyin to us!
Return her to us!
Sister, thanks to you,
I'm getting so many job offers my hands are getting tired.
Every day I open my eyes,
I owe my agent five shows and three appearances.
Haha, I can't take it anymore!
My company has only been around for a few months,
and it's already about to go public.
I plan to take one-third of the company's profits
and establish a charitable foundation
to help those poor orphans.
When my paintings are sent abroad for exhibition,
I also want to speak up for those suffering children.
It seems I'll be leaving everyone soon.
I'm a bit reluctant to leave.
The Cheng family still refuses to leave.
They insist on seeing the Young Mistress.
They know to regret it now,
what was the point? Give... give it back to me!
Ancestor, Ancestor, Ancestor!
You must have a way to save Wuyin,
right?
You must have a way to save Wuyin,
right? We...
we are willing to trade all our lives
for Wuyin's life.
The karmic bond has been severed.
Even if you add all your lives together,
Cheng Wuyin can't possibly come back.
Is there really no way at all?
Even if you just let us see her one more time,
just to say sorry in person would be enough.
You show no sibling affection when the person is alive,
but you cry so movingly after they're dead.
It's all for show, you're only fooling yourselves.
Ancestor! Great Ancestor! Ancestor! Ancestor!
This is all retribution!
This is all retribution!
Hello, CEO Cheng,
bad news, Old Master Cheng's resuscitation failed.
You should come to the hospital to see him one last time.
What?! Ah! Dad!
Dad!
Quick, go to the hospital,
your grandfather is not going to make it!
After the Young Mistress left,
only then did they know regret.
But it was too late to say anything.
We won't be people who regret things after the fact.
Yes, we must live in the present!
Hmph! Sister,
No matter the reason for your coming here
no matter the reason you came to us, your great kindness will never be forgotten.
Sister, thank you.
I should also thank you,
for letting me experience something
I haven't felt in thousands of years.
Since today is such a good day,
why don't we take a family photo?
I agree! I agree too!
Okay!
How can you take a family photo without me!
And me! And me! And me!
This is our family photo.
The three-month period isn't up yet.
My engagement with Miss Wuyin is still valid.
We are Wuyin's servants,
we should be serving the Young Miss. Ha!
Alright! Let's all take it together!
After I finish my tribulation,
everything about me in this world
will disappear, right?
Miss Huiying.
Young Mistress,
you are the only daughter of our Shen family.
You should be in the photo.
Yes, yes, yes, yes, yes!
Come on!
3, 2, 1, cheese!
Ancient cultivator Wufang,
your experience with familial bonds is complete. You are granted ascension.
Do you wish to leave this world now?
Sister,
let's play a couple more rounds of the game later.
Sister, I've finished my new painting,
it's a huge painting of
you and me.
I've designed a new artificial intelligence system,
and named it Yingying.
Young Mistress, it's getting cold.
I've prepared a thick quilt for you.
I've been having nightmares again recently.
I wonder if my soul is unstable again.
When to face the tribulation,
is decided by the Heavenly Dao.
When to ascend is also decided by the Heavenly Dao.
What kind of logic is that?!
In 50 years,
I'll ascend then. Since I've come to this mortal world,
I should enjoy it properly.
There's still time.
I can definitely accompany Miss Wuyin for longer,
and longer.

Defendant Fu Yaining. Involuntary
manslaughter charge sustained. Sentenced
to fixedterm imprisonment. Three years.
>> 3 days ago. Missing for 15 years.
Biological parents. My dear parents
found me. It would be a joyful family
reunion. Never expected. It was a scheme
with my eight fiances jointly set up for
me. A colossal trap.
>> Ning ning. To celebrate your return. Mom
and dad prepared something for you. A
gift.
Mom. Dad. What is this? Sorry, sis. Mom
and dad couldn't bear me going to jail.
Made you come back to take the blame.
Ying has congenital heart disease. You
take her place in prison after your
release. Mom will do anything to
compensate you. Once you're out, our
whole family finally reunite and be
together.
>> Rest assured, fiance. Rest assured,
fiance. Fiance. I'll compensate you.
>> So will we.
>> But what if I refuse?
>> N Yin since age three lost her parents.
Her parents died saving us in that car
accident. We promised her parents to
take good care of her. Ning Ning, please
help your parents.
>> But I'm your real daughter
just because you abandoned me. I'm not
your daughter just because you for 18
years never raised me. I'm not your
biological child.
>> Shut up. We gave you life. Just take
Yan's jail sentence. Not asking you to
die.
>> Today's confession. Sign it willingly or
not. You're going to jail.
>> Sign it now.
I won't sign.
>> Stop her.
[clears throat]
>> No. Let me go.
Let me go.
Behave yourself after release.
3 years behind bars. My biological
parents to save the housekeeper's
daughter personally sent me to hell. Now
I've served my sentence.
Time for reckoning.
Quadriana wishing Yin our baby. Oh,
happy birthday.
>> Yin from Dad. You are birthday gift. A
limited edition Rolls-Royce.
>> Thanks, Dad. Yiny Yin, this is Mom's
birthday gift for you. An imperial jade
necklace. Having parents like you is
wonderful.
>> Yin
one our gift for you. Birthday one.
>> Miss Ying is truly blessed. Beautiful
and adored by everyone. Who wouldn't
like her? Not like the real Foo family
eldest daughter. Still locked up in
prison. Hasn't gotten out yet. Once
you've been in prison, your life is
pretty much ruined, right? I bet the Foo
family won't acknowledge her as their
daughter again. Talking about me big
miss
Fuini.
>> Ning Ning, how are you back? Seems like
you hoped I'd stay locked up forever.
>> Your mother didn't mean it. We're
overjoyed you're back.
>> Is that so?
Imperial green jade.
Nice stuff.
